findings.evidence: Existing bundled API has `toLinearMap_zero/add/nsmul/smul` and `zero/add/nsmul/smul_apply` in `ComoduleCat.lean:198-249`; grep finds only unbundled new lemmas in `Preadditive.lean:89-118` and no `ComoduleCat` neg/sub/zsmul restatements.
findings.fix: Add `@[simp]` bundled wrappers in `namespace ComoduleCat`, matching the existing zero/add/nsmul/smul API: `toLinearMap_neg`, `toLinearMap_sub`, `toLinearMap_zsmul`, `neg_apply`, `sub_apply`, and `zsmul_apply`.
findings.issue: The PR adds negation, subtraction, and `ℤ`-smul on morphisms but only characterizes them for unbundled `Comodule.Hom`; users of `ComoduleCat` cannot simp `( -f ).toLinearMap`, `(f - g) m`, or `(z • f).toLinearMap` at the categorical layer.

summary: The preadditive instance is exposed, but the bundled category is missing the concrete simp API for the new group operations. Add the `ComoduleCat`-level characteristic lemmas before treating this as usable downstream categorical infrastructure.
